== Notes for [[Item:Q100841|Q100841]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/633/Yitzhak-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky Sokolka Families Tree - Yitzhak HaLevi Family''']
--------------------
Disputed date of death 1294

Iggeret Sholomo (Fruchter Yichus) page Tet-Vav (Zayin)

http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~randols/ps55/ps55_110.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD81F4441EFBBFA9822EF79916CC50D
geni:6000000004339504530

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
